name: latency-hunter
description: Latency Hunter Toolkit — quant-engineering skills for Claude Code. Five auditor/generator skills: backtest-guard (backtest pitfall audit), latency-audit (C++ low-latency hot-path review), connector-forge (Binance/OKX connector scaffolding), orderbook-sanity (market-data quality audit) and risk-config-lint (risk-management config audit). No alpha, no keys, no models — engineering only.
